description: Classic meets elegance in this leather maxima watch. It transitions perfectly from day to night. The new range of watches are a fresh take on the Ssteele eye for perfection and are great for urban wear. Comes in a tin. Case diameter: 44 mm Case thickness: 11 mm Dial shape: Round Warranty: 1 year Stainless steel case with a fixed bezel and a leather strap Ssteele logo at the 12-hour mark Tang clasp with a white dial, bright metallic numbers and hands Date aperture at the 5-hour mark Screw to reset time, alarm and set the timer Solid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durability Water resistance up to 30 meters -wearable while washing hands and in mild rain
